slides.headline: AI influencers are making $50k/month
slides.visual_note: AI-generated face with money graphic overlay

slides.headline: What is an AI influencer?
slides.body: Consistent AI-generated persona. Posts daily content. Builds real audience. Monetizes like human creators.

slides.headline: Top earners
slides.body: Aitana Lopez: $10k/month (brand deals). Lil Miquela: $10M+ (music, fashion). Shudu: $300k+ (modeling contracts).

slides.headline: Revenue stream 1: Sponsored posts
slides.body: $500-5,000 per post at 50k followers. No face, no travel, no scheduling conflicts. Brands love the consistency.

slides.headline: Revenue stream 2: Subscriptions
slides.body: OnlyFans/Fansly: $10-50/month per subscriber. 1,000 subs = $10k-50k/month. AI personas doing $100k+ on OF.
slides.visual_note: Subscription platform icons with dollar signs

slides.headline: Revenue stream 3: Digital products
slides.body: Workout plans. Recipe books. Wallpapers. Merch. AI persona as the 'author'. $5-50 per product.

slides.headline: The tech stack
slides.body: Midjourney/DALL-E for images. ElevenLabs for voice. Consistent seed for same face. 30 min/day to run.

slides.headline: Niches that work
slides.body: Fitness coaches. Finance advisors. Fashion models. Lifestyle curators. ASMR. Gaming personas.

slides.headline: The ethics question
slides.body: Disclosure matters. Most platforms require 'AI-generated' labels. Audience often doesn't care if content is valuable.

cta_slide.headline: I'm documenting my AI persona build
